title: romulea columnae subsp. rollii
intro: Romulea columnae subsp. rollii, also known as the Wild Onion or Katteostu, is a plant species in the family Iridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Romulea columnae subsp. rollii include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Romulea columnae subsp. rollii include teas and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
